entity.summary: Permissionless cross-chain ve(3,3) decentralized exchange launched on Telos in November 2022 and upgraded to a multichain V2 architecture in November 2023.
entity.notes: HEI models Archly V1 and V2 as versions of one protocol-level entity. Current first-party documentation describes the DEX as a cross-chain permissionless liquidity protocol and publishes active V2 contract addresses.

events.title: Archly DEX launched on Telos
events.description: Archly opened its first decentralized exchange version on the Telos EVM with permissionless liquidity incentives.
events.notes: The official website and roadmap publish the same launch date.

events.title: Archly DEX V2 launched
events.description: Archly released its enhanced cross-chain DEX generation with cross-chain Arc and veArc tokens and revised fee and emissions controls.
events.notes: V2 is retained as a major protocol upgrade rather than a separate exchange entity.

evidence.title: Archly
evidence.notes: Current first-party homepage states that Archly DEX launched on November 25, 2022 on the Telos EVM.

evidence.title: Archly roadmap: DEX V1 launch
evidence.notes: First-party roadmap records the DEX V1 launch on November 25, 2022.

evidence.title: Archly roadmap: DEX V2 launch
evidence.notes: First-party roadmap records the DEX V2 launch on November 26, 2023.

evidence.title: Ad Infinitum
evidence.notes: First-party release explains the V2 product generation and the separation of later V3 features.

evidence.title: About Archly
evidence.notes: Current first-party documentation describes the active cross-chain DEX and Rainbow Road ecosystem.

evidence.title: Archly security and contract addresses
evidence.notes: First-party security documentation publishes current V1 and V2 contract registries across supported chains.
